audit_assumptions.audit_type: Full 12-category design, AI-slop, and accessibility audit
audit_assumptions.input: Streamlit source, theme configuration, shared CSS, inline Components v2, six page structures, and rendered browser evidence

findings.description: The configured generic sans-serif stack is deterministic offline but does not guarantee the exact Source Sans 3 face on every host.
findings.fix: Vendor a licensed Source Sans 3 WOFF2 asset if exact cross-host typography becomes a release requirement.

findings.description: Very wide native dataframes remain horizontally scrollable on narrow screens, which preserves data but can require deliberate exploration.
findings.fix: Add a mobile column preset if field usage shows that users regularly inspect dense tables on phones.

findings.description: Custom surfaces are semantic, text statuses do not rely on color, focus-visible rings are explicit, and native Streamlit controls retain labels; a release pipeline accessibility crawler is not yet configured.
findings.fix: Add automated axe-core coverage to deployment QA when browser automation becomes part of CI.

coherence.notes: The governed palette, compact geometry, decision-first hierarchy, semantic status language, chart treatment, and control rail now form one domain-specific HealthOps product system across all pages.
